channel.title: Truck Solutions Vehicle Inventory
channel.description: New and used commercial truck inventory for Google Merchant Center.

item.title: New 2027 Hino L6 Cab Chassis
item.description: 2027 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Cab & Chassis Trucks, CUMMINS , Automatic, **2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab Cummins B6.7 Diesel Allison Automatic Chrome Package ** New 2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab featuring the proven Cummins B6.7 turbo diesel engine paired with an Allison automatic transmission. Equipped with the desirable **Chrome Appearance Package**, this truck delivers a professional look while providing the durability, comfort, and reliability that Hino is known for. The extended cab configuration offers additional seating and storage space, making it an excellent choice for landscaping crews, contractors, municipalities, utility companies, and delivery operations. Built on a rugged Class 6 chassis with a GVWR up to 25,950 lbs., the L6 is ready for a wide variety of vocational applications. **Specifications & Features:** * Cummins B6.7 Turbo Diesel Engine * Up to 260 HP / 660 lb-ft Torque * Allison Automatic Transmission * GVWR Up to 25,950 lbs. * Extended Cab Configuration * Chrome Appearance Package * Air Brakes * Air Ride Driver Seat * Heated Power Mirrors * Tilt & Telescoping Steering Column * LED Lighting Package Available * PTO & Vocational Ready * Multiple Wheelbase Options * Advanced Safety Systems * Hino Factory Warranty **Warranty Coverage:** * **3-Year Unlimited Mileage Engine Warranty** * **3-Year Unlimited Mileage Aftertreatment Warranty** * **5-Year Unlimited Mileage Allison Transmission Warranty** Ideal for box trucks, landscaper bodies, utility bodies, stake bodies, flatbeds, dump bodies, and countless other vocational applications. The 2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab offers exceptional value, low operating costs, industry-leading warranty coverage, and the reliability to keep your business moving. **Call for pricing, available wheelbases, body options, financing, and nationwide delivery.** (, 260 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, All Aluminum Wheels, 301 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7EY3V5T50257
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: New 2027 Hino L6 Cab Chassis
item.description: 2027 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Cab & Chassis Trucks, CUMMINS , Automatic, **2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab Cummins B6.7 Diesel Allison Automatic Chrome Package ** New 2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab featuring the proven Cummins B6.7 turbo diesel engine paired with an Allison automatic transmission. Equipped with the desirable **Chrome Appearance Package**, this truck delivers a professional look while providing the durability, comfort, and reliability that Hino is known for. The extended cab configuration offers additional seating and storage space, making it an excellent choice for landscaping crews, contractors, municipalities, utility companies, and delivery operations. Built on a rugged Class 6 chassis with a GVWR up to 25,950 lbs., the L6 is ready for a wide variety of vocational applications. **Specifications & Features:** * Cummins B6.7 Turbo Diesel Engine * Up to 260 HP / 660 lb-ft Torque * Allison Automatic Transmission * GVWR Up to 25,950 lbs. * Extended Cab Configuration * Chrome Appearance Package * Air Brakes * Air Ride Driver Seat * Heated Power Mirrors * Tilt & Telescoping Steering Column * LED Lighting Package Available * PTO & Vocational Ready * Multiple Wheelbase Options * Advanced Safety Systems * Hino Factory Warranty **Warranty Coverage:** * **3-Year Unlimited Mileage Engine Warranty** * **3-Year Unlimited Mileage Aftertreatment Warranty** * **5-Year Unlimited Mileage Allison Transmission Warranty** Ideal for box trucks, landscaper bodies, utility bodies, stake bodies, flatbeds, dump bodies, and countless other vocational applications. The 2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab offers exceptional value, low operating costs, industry-leading warranty coverage, and the reliability to keep your business moving. **Call for pricing, available wheelbases, body options, financing, and nationwide delivery.**, 260 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, Wheels, Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7EY3V5T50260
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: New 2026 Hino L6 Box Truck
item.description: 2026 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Box Trucks - Dry Cargo-Delivery, CUMMINS B6.7, Automatic, For sale: Brand new 2026 Hino L6, ready to meet your toughest hauling needs. This truck is equipped with a 26 Morgan body, offering a spacious 102 width and 97 height, complete with slat line and a scuff liner for added durability. It features a Dhollandia RMM level ride liftgate with a 2,500 lb capacity, ensuring easy and efficient loading. Under the hood, you ll find a powerful 240-horsepower engine backed by a 3-year unlimited mileage warranty, along with a 5-year unlimited mileage warranty on the transmission. DOT-ready and built to last, this truck is ready to go to work for you. Visit New England Truck Solutions at 140 Industrial Drive, North Smithfield, RI 02896 your one-stop shop for quality commercial vehicles., 260 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, All Steel Wheels, 271 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7DV6T5T50841
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans
item.g:product_type: Commercial Trucks > Box Truck > Straight Truck

item.title: New 2026 Hino L6 Box Truck
item.description: 2026 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Box Trucks - Dry Cargo-Delivery, CUMMINS B6.7, Automatic, 2026 Hino L6 Box Truck New VIN: 5PVNJ7DV8T5T52817 Reliable, efficient, and ready to work this 2026 Hino L6 is built for tough jobs and long hauls. Truck Specs: Engine: Cummins B6.7L Turbo Diesel Transmission: 6-Speed Automatic GVWR: 25,950 lbs (Non-CDL) Condition: Brand New Color: White Safety: ABS, airbags, stability control Body: 26-ft ITD Box durable aluminum construction, hardwood/composite floor, roll-up rear door, and LED interior lighting. Optional E-track, liftgate, and side door available. Perfect for delivery, moving, or freight operations. Dependable, fuel-efficient, and ready to go. Financing & competitive pricing available. Contact us today for more details!, 310 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, Aluminum Wheels, 271 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7DV8T5T52817

item.title: New 2027 Hino L6 Dry Van
item.description: 2027 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Box Trucks - Dry Cargo-Delivery, CUMMINS B6.7, Automatic, **2027 Hino L6 26' Box Truck Premium Specification | Air Ride | Air Brakes | Non-CDL** Step up to this exceptionally equipped **2027 Hino L6**, featuring a premium package of performance, comfort, and appearance upgrades designed for operators who demand more from their fleet. Built on a reliable Hino chassis and paired with a durable **26' ITD dry freight body**, this truck offers long-term value, enhanced driver comfort, and a professional appearance that stands out on the road. The **ITD body features a fully galvanized understructure**, providing superior corrosion resistance and making it an excellent candidate for future body swaps, helping maximize your investment over the life of the truck. **Premium Features Include:** * **Upgraded 260 HP Engine** * **LED Headlight Package** for improved visibility and modern styling * **Digital Dashboard Upgrade** with advanced driver information display * **Aluminum Wheels** for reduced weight and enhanced appearance * **Chrome Bumper & Mirror Package** * **Air Ride Suspension** for superior ride quality and cargo protection * **Air Brake System** * **26' ITD Dry Freight Body** * **Fully Galvanized Body Understructure** * **Maxon GPT 3,000 lb. Liftgate** * **60" x 80" Liftgate Platform** * **E-Track and Slat Line Cargo Securement System** * **Non-CDL Configuration** no CDL required in most applications This truck is ideal for furniture delivery, final-mile distribution, appliance transportation, moving companies, and general freight operations. The combination of upgraded horsepower, air ride suspension, air brakes, premium appearance package, and advanced driver features delivers a higher level of performance, comfort, and resale value than a standard specification truck. If you're looking for a top-tier non-CDL straight truck that is built to perform today and retain value tomorrow, this 2027 Hino L6 deserves a closer look., 260 Horse Power, Air Ride Suspension, Wheels, 301 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7EY8V5T50254
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: New 2027 Hino L6 Moving Van
item.description: 2027 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Box Trucks - Moving, CUMMINS B6.7, Automatic, 2027 Hino model L6 with air ride In stock and ready to move! 260HP Cummins 90 gallon fuel tank Air Brakes 26' Kentucky moving van body Mirror finished stainless overlays on front radius Translucent roof with lining 5' attic 12' x 30" Melcher walkboard Full spray on undercoating Chassis includes 5 year / 250k mile extended engine warranty Price: $142,265 FOB Louisville, KY, 260 Horse Power, Air Ride Suspension, Aluminum Wheels, 271 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7DV9V5T54966

item.title: New 2024 Peterbilt 536 Rollback Tow Truck
item.description: 2024 PETERBILT, 536, Medium Duty Trucks - Tow Trucks - Roll-back, PACCAR , , 2024 PETERBILT 536 ROLLBACK TOW TRUCK For Sale: Brand New 2024 Peterbilt Rollback Tow Truck Top of the Line! Looking for the ultimate rollback tow truck? This brand-new 2024 Peterbilt is built for performance, durability, and efficiency. Miller Industries 12 Series LCG Body 21-Foot Chevron Bed with galvanized steel for maximum protection against rust and wear Fully Remote-Controlled top-of-the-line technology for seamless operation Auto-Grip Wheel Lift closes automatically for convenience and efficiency Air Ride & Air Brakes for a smooth and controlled ride Powerful Cummins Engine for reliable towing power Price: $185,000 Available now at New England Truck Solutions North Smithfield location Call Today- (, Horse Power, Air Ride Suspension, Wheels, Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 2NPKHM6X6RM686549
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: New 2024 Hino S5 Cab / Chassis Trucks
item.description:
Introducing the 2024 Hino S5 Standard Cab, a versatile and reliable workhorse designed to meet the demands of your business. With multiple wheelbase options available, along with the flexibility of a crew cab configuration, the Hino S5 is customizable to suit your specific upfit requirements.
Key Features:
Year: 2024 Model: Hino S5 Standard Cab Wheelbase Options: Choose from multiple wheelbase options to tailor the vehicle to your upfit needs. Crew Cab Available: Need additional seating capacity? Opt for the crew cab configuration to accommodate your team. Versatility and Performance:
The Hino S5 is built to handle the toughest jobs with ease, offering exceptional durability and performance. With its robust construction and powerful engine options, the S5 delivers the reliability and efficiency you need to get the job done. Comfort and Convenience:
Inside the spacious cab, you'll find a comfortable and ergonomic workspace designed to enhance productivity. With intuitive controls and smart storage solutions, the Hino S5 makes every journey more enjoyable and efficient. Safety and Security:
The Hino S5 is equipped with advanced safety features to help protect you and your crew on the road. From its sturdy construction to its comprehensive safety systems, the S5 offers peace of mind wherever your work takes you. Customization Options:
Whether you need a specialized upfit for your industry or custom configurations to meet specific requirements, the Hino S5 offers a range of options to suit your needs. Work with our team to explore available upfit options and create a solution that's tailored to your business. Experience the Hino Advantage:
Discover why the Hino S5 is the preferred choice for businesses across industries. Contact us today to learn more about the 2024 Hino S5 Standard Cab and explore your customization options.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: New 2027 Hino L6 Cab Chassis
item.description: 2027 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Cab & Chassis Trucks, CUMMINS , Automatic, 2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab 301 Wheelbase Ready for 26 Body Installation Brand new 2027 Hino L6 Extended Cab chassis configured on a 301 wheelbase and set up perfectly for a 26 box truck application. This truck is available for body swaps or can be paired with a brand new Morgan dry van body and liftgate package at additional cost. Powered and built for durability, reliability, and driver comfort, this Hino is equipped with air suspension, power windows and door locks, halogen headlights, and steel wheels. The extended cab provides additional interior storage and added convenience for crews or long workdays. Ideal for delivery, moving, logistics, fleet operations, or custom upfit applications. Price: $94,164 for cab & chassis only (Body and liftgate not included but available and can be priced separately.) Contact us for complete body options, liftgate packages, and financing availability., 240 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, Aluminum Wheels, 301 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7EYXV5T50255
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: 2027 Hino L6 Dry Van
item.description: 2027 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Box Trucks - Dry Cargo-Delivery, CUMMINS B6.7, Automatic, **2027 Hino L6 26' Box Truck Non-CDL | Air Ride Suspension | Premium ITD Body** Available now, this **2027 Hino L6** is equipped with a **26-foot ITD dry freight body** designed for maximum durability, longevity, and versatility. The body features a **fully galvanized understructure**, significantly reducing the risk of corrosion and making it an excellent candidate for future body swaps, helping protect your investment for years to come. Key features include: * **26' ITD Dry Freight Body** * **Fully Galvanized Underbody Construction** for superior rust prevention * **Maxon GPT 3,000 lb. Liftgate** with a large **60" x 80" platform** * **Air Ride Suspension** for improved ride quality and cargo protection * **E-Track and Slat Line Cargo Securement System** * **Non-CDL Configuration** no CDL required in most applications * Reliable and fuel-efficient **Hino L6 chassis** Whether you're in furniture delivery, final-mile logistics, appliance transportation, or general freight, this truck offers the durability, cargo control, and ease of operation your business demands. The galvanized ITD body provides long-term value by resisting rust and extending service life, while the air ride suspension helps ensure a smoother ride for both driver and cargo. Contact us today for pricing, specifications, and availability., 260 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, Wheels, 301 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7EY7V5T50259
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: 2019 Hino 155 Cab / Chassis Trucks - 2019 HINO 155 16FT BOX
item.description:
2019 Hino 155 16FT Box Truck – $15,000
Looking for a reliable, work-ready box truck at a great value? This 2019 Hino 155 is a solid choice for any business looking to expand their fleet without breaking the bank.
• 179,505 miles • 16ft box – perfect for deliveries, moving, or logistics work • Durable and fuel-efficient diesel engine • Reverse camera for added safety and easier maneuvering • Smooth driving and dependable Hino performance
This truck comes with an extended warranty that covers key emissions-related components, including DEF lines, sensors, NOx system, turbos, and more—helping you avoid costly repairs and keep your business running.
Stock #: UTS-2019 VIN: JHHYDM1H6KK008109 Location: North Smithfield, RI dealership
Priced to sell at just $15,000 – great opportunity for anyone looking to get into a dependable medium-duty truck at an affordable price.
Reach out today for more details or to schedule a time to see it in person.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: 2020 Hino 195 Cab Chassis
item.description: 2020 HINO, 195, Medium Duty Trucks - Cab & Chassis Trucks, HINO J05E, AMT, 2020 Hino 195 Cab and Chassis Ready for Customization! This 2020 Hino 195 Cab and Chassis is fully serviced and DOT-ready, with a fresh coat of paint on the frame and wheels, making it retail-ready. The vehicle comes with an extended warranty on key major components, ensuring peace of mind. Featuring a 161" wheelbase and a 133" cab-to-axle, this unit is ideal for an 18 to 20 body perfect for a variety of applications. If you need more customization, we can also equip it with a Switch-N-Go system or tailor it to your specific business needs. This dependable Hino truck is built for long-term performance and reliability. Contact us today for more details or to schedule a test drive, 210 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, Wheels, 161 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN JHHGDM2H9LK001862

This truck is ideal for delivery, moving, contracting, or fleet expansion. item.title: 2020 Hino 195 Hooklift Truck
item.description: 2020 HINO, 195, Medium Duty Trucks - Hooklift Trucks, HINO J05E, Automatic, **2020 HINO 195 14' Interchangeable Roll-Off Body Package** Ready to work! This **2020 Hino 195** comes equipped with a **14' interchangeable body system** that is built stronger and more durable than a traditional Switch-N-Go setup. **Package Includes:** * 14' Interchangeable Body System * Switch-N-Go Style Container/Can * Automatic Tarping System (Auto Topper) * 18,000 lb Winch with Cable * Option to Add Toolbox or I-Pack Storage System **Additional Benefits:** * **3-Year Warranty** on Turbo & Aftertreatment System * Fully Serviced * DOT Inspected & Ready to Work * Clean, Reliable, and Fleet-Maintained Perfect for contractors, landscaping companies, junk removal businesses, dumpster rental operations, and municipalities looking for a versatile truck that can handle multiple applications. **Financing Available** Contact us today for pricing, financing options, and additional equipment packages., 215 Horse Power, Spring Suspension, All Steel Wheels, 161 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN JHHGDM2H6LK001821

item.title: 2023 Isuzu NRR Dump Truck
item.description: 2023 ISUZU, NRR, Medium Duty Trucks - Dump Trucks, , Automatic, For Sale: 2023 Isuzu NRR HOOK LIFT STELLAR MODEL 108-12 This 2023 Isuzu NRR equipped with STELLAR HOOK LIFT is a powerful, reliable solution for contractors, landscapers, municipalities, and construction professionals. Built on Isuzu s proven medium-duty platform, this truck delivers durability, efficiency, and ease of operation in a highly maneuverable package. Powered by a 5.2L Isuzu 4HK1-TC turbo diesel engine producing approximately 215 horsepower and 452 lb-ft of torque, this NRR provides the strength needed for demanding job sites while maintaining excellent fuel efficiency. Paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission, it offers smooth shifting and dependable performance under load. Key Features: 2023 Isuzu NRR chassis Durable CAN 15YD 5.2L 4HK1-TC Turbo Diesel Engine 6-Speed Automatic Transmission Strong payload capacity Excellent visibility and maneuverability Ideal for construction, landscaping, paving, and municipal work The Isuzu NRR is known for its tight turning radius, driver comfort, and long-term reliability making it a smart addition to any fleet or owner-operator business. We also have the facilities to professionally change the color of the dump body if desired, allowing you to match your company branding or fleet specifications. Contact us today for more details or to schedule a viewing. This truck is work-ready and built to perform., Horse Power, Spring Suspension, Aluminum Wheels, Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN JALE5W165P7305197
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans

item.title: 2023 Ford TRANSIT Cargo Van
item.description: 2023 FORD, TRANSIT, Light Duty Trucks - Vans - Cargo, FORD 3.5L ECOBOOST V6, Automatic, 2023 Ford Transit 350 AWD Only 14K Miles Clean, low-mileage van ready to work. Equipped with a brand new Thermo King V520 RT MAX reefer unit with electric standby just installed, along with a brand new insulated cargo insert. Perfect for food, floral, medical, or any temp-controlled business. AWD for all-weather reliability. Runs and drives like new. * 14,000 miles * Extended powertrain warranty * Brand new reefer + interior setup (unused) * Electric standby capability * Turnkey and ready to go Financing available., Horse Power, Spring Suspension, Wheels, 147.6 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 1FTBW2XG4PKA40098

item.title: 2024 Hino L6 Reefer/Refrigerated Truck
item.description: 2024 HINO, L6, Medium Duty Trucks - Box Trucks - Reefer, CUMMINS B6.7, Automatic, **2024 Hino L6 26' Reefer Truck Low Miles Save Thousands vs. New!** Why wait for a new truck when you can save thousands and get to work immediately? This **2024 Hino L6 Refrigerated Truck** is ready to hit the road with only **24,649 miles** and is fully serviced, DOT inspected, and work-ready. Equipped with a **Thermo King T-1090 refrigeration unit with low operating hours**, this truck is ideal for food distribution, produce delivery, frozen goods, pharmaceuticals, and temperature-sensitive freight. **Features Include:** 2024 Hino L6 Chassis Only 24,649 Miles Thermo King T-1090 Reefer Unit Low Hours 26' Insulated Reefer Body 102" Wide Body 97" Interior Height Flat Floor Design for Easy Loading & Unloading Full E-Track Cargo Securement System Recently Serviced & DOT Ready Excellent Condition Inside and Out Need a liftgate? No problem. **We can install a liftgate in-house at an additional cost** to customize the truck to your operation's needs. **Financing Available** Competitive financing options are available for qualified buyers. Don't miss this opportunity to own a late-model refrigerated truck without paying new-truck pricing. **Contact us today for pricing and availability!** NEW ENGLAND TRUCK SOLUTIONS. 140 Industrial Drive North Smithfield, RI 02896, 260 Horse Power, Air Ride Suspension, Aluminum Wheels, 271 Wheel Base, , Axle, Ratio, , VIN 5PVNJ7AV3R5T56352
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicles > Motor Vehicles > Cars, Trucks & Vans
